name: Artichoke Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 cups chicken broth OR 1 cup broth plus 1 cup dry white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the chicken in butter until cooked through.
2. Transfer the chicken to an ungreased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish; do not remove excess pan juices.
3. Cut artichokes into quarters and arrange on top of the chicken. Scatter mushrooms over the chicken as well.
4. In a separate saucepan, sauté onion in remaining pan juices until softened.
5. Add flour, dried rosemary, salt, and pepper to the onions. Stir to combine.
6. Gradually whisk in chicken broth (or broth plus white wine) into the onion mixture, cooking until thickened and bubbling.
7. Remove from heat and pour sauce over the chicken.
8. Cover dish with foil or a lid and bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through and tender.
9. Serve hot, placing noodles on a serving platter. Top each portion with chicken and spoon sauce, garnishing with fresh parsley.
